prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: portrait upgrade card background for a mobile game supply selection popup
Primary request: Create a vertical post-apocalyptic sci-fi UI card frame specifically designed for nine-slice use.
Scene/backdrop: transparent background only
Subject: one centered upright card frame, front-facing, no perspective
Style: premium wasteland-tech metal, bronze steel, subtle amber light seams, dark inner panel, crisp game-ready render
Composition: tall portrait card with strong four corners, clear left and right borders, clear top and bottom borders, and a calm dark center suitable for text and icon placement
Technical requirements: ideal for a final in-game card around 176x360; keep corner ornaments contained inside a 120px safe margin; top and bottom borders should be straight and stretch-safe; left and right edges should be straight and stretch-safe; center area should be dark and low-detail; no text, no icons, no particles, no detached decorative wings; transparent outside the card silhouette
Output goal: source artwork suitable for Sprite SLICED border setup without corner distortion

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: wide CTA button background for a mobile game supply popup
Primary request: Create a wide premium orange sci-fi button designed specifically for nine-slice use.
Scene/backdrop: transparent background only
Subject: one centered wide horizontal button, front-facing, no perspective
Style: post-apocalyptic tech metal casing with bright amber-orange core, polished but worn edges, strong readability for overlaid text, clean game-ready render
Composition: wide button with self-contained left and right caps, straight top and bottom edges, and a broad stretch-safe center region
Technical requirements: ideal for a final in-game button around 340x70; keep left and right cap details inside a 120px safe margin; center should be bright and smooth enough to stretch; top and bottom rails should remain visually stable when stretched; no text, no icons, no floating effects outside the silhouette; transparent outside the button shape
Output goal: source artwork suitable for Sprite SLICED border setup without corner distortion
